hero.sub: Past the point where creams reach. Not ready for surgery. Sofwave ultrasound rebuilds collagen deep in the skin — a natural lift to the jaw, brow and neck from a single session, with zero downtime.

pain.title_html:
You're past creams —
but not ready for a scalpel.

cards.title: The serums sit on top now
cards.body: What used to be enough now stays on the surface, while the jawline keeps softening underneath where nothing topical can reach.

cards.title: Small slips that read as tired
cards.body: A heavier jaw, a hooding brow, a looser neck. Nothing dramatic — but enough that the mirror says 'tired' on a day you feel fine.

cards.title: Surgery doesn't fit your life
cards.body: A facelift feels too drastic, and weeks of downtime simply don't slot around work and family. So you keep waiting.

problem.title_html:
The change is happening
where creams can't go.
problem.lede: Laxity isn't a surface problem you can correct from a bottle. It sits in the mid-dermis — the same layer a surgeon works in — and that's the honest reason the routine stopped delivering.

points.title: It's depth, not diligence
points.body: Once laxity sets in, the change is in the deep dermis. No matter how good the routine, topicals physically can't reach that layer.

points.title: The structure is loosening
points.body: Collagen and elastin in the mid-dermis thin and slacken with age. Creams work above that layer, so the slide quietly continues underneath.

points.title: You were only offered two extremes
points.body: Keep buying creams that can't reach it, or have surgery you don't want. The useful middle option rarely gets properly explained.

story.title_html:
A lift that arrives the way
your skin does — gradually.

timeline.title: One ~30-minute session
timeline.body: Targeted ultrasound reaches the mid-dermis; integrated cooling keeps the surface comfortable. You leave the same day — maybe slight redness, nothing to hide.

timeline.title: Early firmness
timeline.body: Skin begins responding and feels a little tauter. Subtle, never a sudden 'new face' — exactly as a real result should start.

timeline.title: The lift settles in
timeline.body: New collagen matures and the result arrives. The jaw, brow and neck read tighter and more defined — gradually enough that it looks well-rested, not 'done.'

solution.mark_html: Sofwave™ uses ultrasound to rebuild your own collagen in the layer where firmness is actually lost — so the lift comes from your skin, not from a knife.

how.title_html:
Three steps — and the
first one is the honest part.
how.lede: Sofwave delivers controlled ultrasound energy to the mid-dermis to trigger new collagen, with integrated cooling keeping the surface comfortable and unmarked. But it only starts if it's genuinely right for you.

steps.title: Consultation first
steps.body: A trained therapist assesses your skin and the areas in question — and tells you honestly whether Sofwave will actually help, or whether it won't.

steps.title: Targeted ultrasound
steps.body: Energy is delivered to the mid-dermis across the chosen areas — jaw, brow, neck or submental — with integrated cooling for comfort, in about 30 minutes.

steps.title: Collagen rebuilds
steps.body: Over ~3 months your own new collagen matures and lifts. We review with you and suggest maintenance only if and when it's genuinely useful.

proof.title_html:
The clinic Chatswood
keeps coming back to.
proof.sample_note: Verified, public reviews from i-Beaute's Fresha and Bookwell profiles. These are clinic-wide — about the team, care and professionalism — not Sofwave-specific results.

quotes.quote: Feel so pampered after the treatment. Portia and her staff are very professional and friendly.
quotes.name: Maria W.

quotes.quote: My skin was blocked, clogged and breaking out. The team analysed my needs…
quotes.name: Kelly B.

quotes.quote: Extremely friendly staff. Highly recommend — will be going back. Amazing!
quotes.name: Ayva

authority.title_html:
We'll tell you when
Sofwave isn't the answer.
authority.body: At i‑Beaute Skin + Body in Chatswood, advanced treatments are delivered by trained skin therapists who treat your face as a whole — never a single sale. Every Sofwave plan starts with a proper consultation and an honest answer about suitability, even when that answer is no.
creds: Trained, certified Sofwave practitioners — not a sideline add-on
A real assessment before any treatment; the face treated as a whole
Established Chatswood clinic — The Gallery, Suite 16, 445 Victoria Ave

benefits.title: What a fair lift looks like.

items.title: Reaches where creams can't
items.body: Ultrasound targets the mid-dermis to rebuild collagen at the exact layer responsible for laxity.

items.title: Zero downtime
items.body: Mild redness at most; most people return to their day immediately, with no marks to hide.

items.title: Natural, gradual result
items.body: The lift builds over ~3 months, so it reads as well-rested — never surgically altered.

items.title: One session, all skin tones
items.body: A single ~30-minute treatment that works independently of melanin, suitable year-round.

offer.title: Complimentary skin & suitability consultation
bullets: Targeted Sofwave treatment (jaw, brow, neck or submental)
offer.fine: Consultation is complimentary; treatment pricing is tailored to the areas treated and confirmed at your consultation.

comparison.title_html:
The lift between a cream
and a scalpel.

yes.title: Sofwave is for you if…
items: You're noticing early to moderate laxity on the jaw, brow or neck
You want a natural lift, not a dramatic change
You can't fit surgical downtime around work and family
You'd rather invest once than keep chasing results with creams

no.title: Maybe not, if…
items: You have significant, advanced sagging that's genuinely better suited to surgery
You're expecting an instant, overnight transformation
You're pregnant or have certain medical conditions — we'll tell you honestly at consult

items.a: Most clients describe a warming sensation with brief moments of heat. Sofwave's integrated cooling keeps the surface comfortable, and your therapist adjusts to you throughout.
Yes. Mild redness or slight puffiness at most, and no marks to hide. Most people return to their day immediately.
Some firmness appears in the first weeks, but the real result builds as new collagen matures — typically over about three months after a single session.
Results from new collagen are long-lasting, though skin keeps ageing naturally. Many choose a maintenance session later. We'll give you an honest, personalised view at your consult.

items.q: Is it safe for my skin tone?
items.a: Yes. Sofwave's ultrasound works independently of melanin, so it's suitable for all skin tones, year-round.

items.q: How do I start, and what does it cost?
items.a: With a complimentary consultation, where we assess suitability and recommend Sofwave only if it's genuinely right for you. Pricing is tailored to the areas treated and confirmed there. Book on Fresha.

final.title_html:
If the creams have stopped
and surgery feels too far.
final.body: This is the honest middle. No pressure, no single sale — just a real assessment and a straight answer about whether Sofwave suits you. Start with a complimentary consultation.
